title: Seeing the Multivariate Normal
tagline: From one bell curve to clouds, marginals, and slices
summary: A longer, example-driven explainer that starts with the ordinary bell curve, then builds a 2D Gaussian with live marginals, conditional slices, and concrete stories.
highlights: Start with a live 1D bell curve before moving into two dimensions.
Rotate and stretch a Gaussian cloud with direct control of covariance.
Load concrete examples and drag slice lines to see marginals and conditionals update in sync.
Finish with short takeaways that tie geometry, probability, and conditioning together.
